title: Telegram Completion Handoff Conformance
objective: Run the real OpenClaw Telegram adapter against the local Telegram Bot API shim and prove only the generated-media completion handoff workflows used for regression isolation.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova can configure the packaged Telegram adapter for the shim.

phases.title: Run Telegram Completion Handoff Workflows
phases.intent: Inject normal Telegram user messages that ask OpenClaw to generate media, then verify the completed media is sent back through Telegram direct and topic/thread routes.
evidence: completion handoff route and media delivery invariants
